CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Check this box if the file list cache is corrupted and access fails.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Do not refer to file list cache

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Check this box if the read status is not reflected unless the update button is pressed.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Do not use time reduction when returning to the list view

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Open the file that was last opened automatically when the application starts.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Open the last file on startup

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Do not display a confirmation dialog when opening a previously viewed file at startup
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Automatically open previously viewed files

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Expands to display the contents of the file by tapping zip/rar/pdf file.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Expanded file on tap

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Opens EPUB files in image Viewer instead of text Viewer.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Open the EPUB file in Image viewer

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Display the move to parent directory in file list.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: View Parent Directory

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Show extension in the file name.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Show Extension

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Split the file name with []() in Tile View
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Split the file name

src.comitton.config.seekbar.FontTitleSee.android:dialogMessage: Select font size of the title.
src.comitton.config.seekbar.FontTitleSee.android:title: Title Font Size

src.comitton.config.seekbar.FontMainSeek.android:dialogMessage: Select font size of the list.
src.comitton.config.seekbar.FontMainSeek.android:title: Font Size

src.comitton.config.seekbar.FontSubSeekb.android:dialogMessage: Select summary font size of the list.
src.comitton.config.seekbar.FontSubSeekb.android:title: Summary Font Size

src.comitton.config.seekbar.FontTileSeek.android:dialogMessage: Select font size of the tile view.
src.comitton.config.seekbar.FontTileSeek.android:title: Font Size

src.comitton.config.seekbar.ItemMarginSe.android:dialogMessage: Select margin size of list item.
src.comitton.config.seekbar.ItemMarginSe.android:title: List Item Margin

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Show the toolbar icon name.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Toolbar Icon Name

src.comitton.config.seekbar.ToolbarSeekb.android:dialogMessage: Set the icon size of the toolbar.
src.comitton.config.seekbar.ToolbarSeekb.android:title: Toolbar Size

src.comitton.config.ThumbnailPreference.android:dialogMessage: Set the icon size of the thumbnail.
src.comitton.config.ThumbnailPreference.android:title: Thumbnail Size

src.comitton.config.seekbar.ListThumbSee.android:dialogMessage: Set thumbnail size of the list.
src.comitton.config.seekbar.ListThumbSee.android:title: List Thumbnail Size

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Check this box to specify the number of columns in the thumbnail grid.\n*If increasing the number of columns in the thumbnail grid causes thumbnail display updates to fail, try reducing the thumbnail size.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Specify the number of columns for the thumbnail grid.

ListPreference.android:dialogTitle: Number of columns (vertical) in the thumbnail grid
ListPreference.android:title: Number of columns (vertical) in the thumbnail grid
Number of columns (horizontal) in the thumbnail grid

src.comitton.config.seekbar.TileThumbRat.android:dialogMessage: Set the zoom level for tile view thumbnails.
src.comitton.config.seekbar.TileThumbRat.android:dialogTitle: Thumbnail zoom level in tile view
src.comitton.config.seekbar.TileThumbRat.android:title: Thumbnail zoom level in tile view

src.comitton.config.seekbar.ListThumbRat.android:dialogMessage: Set the zoom level for thumbnails in list view.
src.comitton.config.seekbar.ListThumbRat.android:dialogTitle: Thumbnail zoom level in list view
src.comitton.config.seekbar.ListThumbRat.android:title: Thumbnail zoom level in list view

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: To determine the first file name to see all the file name of the compressed file.(Very Slower for RAR file)
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Create first name Thumbnail

ListPreference.android:dialogTitle: Servertype for create first name Thumbnail
ListPreference.android:title: Servertype for create first name Thumbnail

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Exit existing task at shortcut startup.\n(Valid only in the newly created shortcut.)
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Exit task by shortcut
Thumbnail on Menu

src.comitton.config.seekbar.MenuLongTapS.android:dialogMessage: Select the long press hold time.
src.comitton.config.seekbar.MenuLongTapS.android:summary: Time until long press operations are accepted in the file list and recorder menu
src.comitton.config.seekbar.MenuLongTapS.android:title: Time to long tap

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: When shuffling sorting, the shuffled content is kept until the list is updated or the sort mode is changed.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Keep shuffled sorting

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Check this box if you do not want to scroll the viewer after it is displayed.(effective after restarting.)
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Keep original position when returning to list view

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Check this box if you do not want to display the reading rate donut chart.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Do not display reading rate donut chart

ListPreference.android:dialogTitle: Text display of reading rate in list view
ListPreference.android:title: Text display of reading rate in list view

ListPreference.android:dialogTitle: Choice of reading rate donut chart/progress bar
ListPreference.android:title: Choice of reading rate donut chart/progress bar

ListPreference.android:dialogTitle: Coordinates of the reading rate progress bar
ListPreference.android:title: Coordinates of the reading rate progress bar

ListPreference.android:dialogTitle: Setting the width of the progress bar for reading rate
ListPreference.android:title: Setting the width of the progress bar for reading rate

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Check this box if you want to use the reference value instead of a percentage.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: The rightmost value of the progress bar is the actual value.

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: If you select a text page in the image viewer, an error will occur, so check it at your own risk.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Enable text in file extraction

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Enable the filter check in marker settings by default.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Check the filter in the marker settings.

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Enable checking the directory in marker settings by default.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Check the directory for marker settings.

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: The identification time for compressed files will be shortened by fixing the identification process using a magic number instead of automatic detection.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Referencing a magic number for identifying compressed files

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: If retrieving thumbnails takes a long time due to errors, checking this box will shorten the retrieval time (to re-retrieve thumbnails, right-click the file and select "Delete Thumbnail Cache").
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Skip the process if thumbnail retrieval fails.

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Do not use the ZIP compressed file extraction library (Checking this box may fix issues if the first image in the file cannot be read or thumbnail images cannot be retrieved) (Note: ZIP files in 64-bit/LZMA/Bzip2 format will not be able to be opened)
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Load ZIP files using the old method.

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Use the RAR compressed file decompression library (checking this box may fix issues if the first image in the file cannot be read or thumbnail images cannot be retrieved)
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Reading RAR files using the old method

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Check this box to identify ZIP files containing Aozora Bunko texts (displayed using a web-based EPUB viewer).
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Load ZIP files from Aozora Bunko.

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Check the box to hide file extensions in the list view.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Do not display file extensions in the list view.

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Check this option to speed up page turning by extracting PDF files other than local files to a temporary file before opening them.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Extract to a temporary file before opening the pdf file

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Check this box to skip updating the file list screen when opening a viewer from history or bookmarks.\n* The file list screen will be updated if it differs from the latest file list.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Skip updating the file list screen.
